name: London Stock Exchange Group plc
description: London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG) is a leading global financial markets infrastructure and data provider. Headquartered in London, the group plays a central role in the world’s financial system, offering a broad range of services including capital formation, intellectual property, and risk management. LSEG operates across multiple asset classes, providing trading venues, clearing services, and high-quality data and analytics to a diverse international client base. Through its commitment to innovation and transparency, the company supports global economic growth by connecting capital with ideas and facilitating efficient, secure, and sustainable financial markets for participants worldwide.
